mapper.insert: INSERT INTO member ( login_id, password, name, phone, email, address, zipcode, address_detail, birth, gender, role, status ) VALUES ( #{loginId}, #{password}, #{name}, #{phone}, #{email}, #{address}, #{zipcode}, #{addressDetail}, #{birth}, #{gender}, 'USER', 'ACTIVE' )
mapper.select: SELECT id, login_id AS loginId, password, name, phone, email, address, zipcode, address_detail AS addressDetail, birth, gender, role, status, created_at AS createdAt FROM member WHERE login_id = #{loginId}
SELECT id, login_id AS loginId, password, name, phone, email, address, zipcode, address_detail AS addressDetail, birth, gender, role, status, created_at AS createdAt FROM member WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE member SET password = #{password}, name = #{name}, phone = #{phone}, email = #{email}, address = #{address}, zipcode = #{zipcode}, address_detail = #{addressDetail}, birth = #{birth}, gender = #{gender} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, login_id AS loginId, password, name, phone, email, address, zipcode, address_detail AS addressDetail, birth, gender, role, status, created_at AS createdAt FROM member WHERE name = #{name} AND email = #{email}

SELECT id, login_id AS loginId, password, name, phone, email, address, zipcode, address_detail AS addressDetail, birth, gender, role, status, created_at AS createdAt FROM member WHERE login_id = #{loginId} AND name = #{name} AND email = #{email}

SELECT m.id, m.login_id AS loginId, m.password, m.name, m.phone, m.email, m.address, m.zipcode, m.address_detail AS addressDetail, m.birth, m.gender, m.role, m.status, m.created_at AS createdAt,
IFNULL(m.mileage, 0) AS mileage,
IFNULL(( SELECT SUM(o.final_price) FROM orders o WHERE o.member_id = m.id ), 0) AS totalOrderAmount
FROM member m
ORDER BY CASE WHEN m.role = 'ADMIN' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, m.id ASC

SELECT m.id, m.login_id AS loginId, m.password, m.name, m.phone, m.email, m.address, m.zipcode, m.address_detail AS addressDetail, m.birth, m.gender, m.role, m.status, m.created_at AS createdAt,
IFNULL(m.mileage, 0) AS mileage,
IFNULL(( SELECT SUM(o.final_price) FROM orders o WHERE o.member_id = m.id ), 0) AS totalOrderAmount
FROM member m WHERE 1=1
AND DATE(m.created_at) >= #{startDate}
AND DATE(m.created_at) <= #{endDate}
ORDER BY CASE WHEN m.role = 'ADMIN' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END,
m.id m.login_id m.name m.phone m.email totalOrderAmount m.mileage m.role m.status m.created_at m.id
DESC ASC
